content:
Hello, I am new to the Codingame community, and this marks my first contribution. I have developed this puzzle as a personal milestone – it is inspired by the first program I successfully executed early in my journey as an IT learner.
 
My goal is to share a beginner-friendly challenge that introduces core programming logic and basic arithmetic, helping those just starting out build a strong foundation. While I recognize there is room for improvement, I am eager to receive feedback and suggestions from the community to refine this work. Thank you for your time and support!
